counting_policy.declared_challenge_tag_counts: Counts only relation labels mapped from rule_structure.challenge_types. A task may count in multiple columns.
counting_policy.evidence_or_tag_counts: Union of declared tags and evidence inferred from referenced full-KG rule guards, rule relations, defeated-rule labels, and public task_or_scenario_model constraints. A task may count in multiple columns.
counting_policy.precedence_note: The current fullkg_clean main splits contain no task whose referenced full-KG rules or challenge labels instantiate precedence.
